channel.title: Speak Malayalam — Listen & Learn
channel.itunes:author: Reshmi R Nair
channel.description: Learn casual, everyday spoken Malayalam by listening. Short, slow conversations voiced by a native speaker, each with a full transcript in Malayalam, romanised spelling and English. Perfect for beginners, NRIs, partners of Malayalis and travellers to Kerala. By Reshmi R Nair, Malayalam Linguist.
channel.itunes:summary: Learn casual spoken Malayalam by listening to short, slow conversations with full transcripts (Malayalam, romanised, English). For beginners, NRIs and travellers.

item.title: A Day in Malayalam — Everyday Phrases
item.itunes:title: A Day in Malayalam — Everyday Phrases
item.description: Casual spoken Malayalam audio: A Day in Malayalam — Everyday Phrases. Full transcript in Malayalam, romanised and English at https://speakmalayalam.com/malayalam-listen.html
item.itunes:summary: Casual spoken Malayalam audio: A Day in Malayalam — Everyday Phrases. Full transcript at https://speakmalayalam.com/malayalam-listen.html
